notes: Mature data scraping library with 200+ interfaces. Heavy web scraping dependency makes it fragile long-term. Fork to extract stable API patterns and local storage logic, remove web scraping.
Clean architecture with East Money dependency. Good code structure for reference but limited without web access. Borrow API patterns, rebuild with local data.
TDX (通达信) data wrapper with stable server infrastructure. Good for historical K-line data. Adopt as secondary data source with local caching.
Pro token-based API with official backend. Most reliable upstream but requires paid token. Fork to use free tier endpoints, implement local caching layer.
Free API with historical data focus. Server reliability issues but no cost. Adopt as backup source, implement robust retry logic and local fallback.
Specialized CNINFO disclosure scrapers. Narrow focus but valuable for regulatory filings. Fork to extract announcement parsing logic.
Aggregator pattern with local caching. Good architecture reference. Borrow data fusion and caching patterns, not the web dependencies.
